info.title: Pharmeasy API
info.description:
REST API for the **Pharmeasy** pharmacy and doctor-consultation platform.

## Authentication
Protected endpoints require a **Bearer JWT** token.
1. Call `POST /send-otp` with your email to receive a one-time password.
2. Call `POST /verify-otp/customer` (or `/admin`, `/doctor`) with the OTP to receive a token.
3. Click **Authorize** above and paste the token (no `Bearer ` prefix needed).

## Roles
| Role | Access |
|------|--------|
| **Customer** | Products, cart, orders, bookings, coupon apply |
| **Doctor** | Own unavailability schedule |
| **Admin** | Full management access to all resources |

post.summary: Send a one-time password to the given email address.
post.description: Creates a new user record if the email is not registered. OTP expires in 10 minutes.

post.summary: Verify an OTP and sign in as a Customer.
post.description: Returns a JWT token scoped to the Customer role on success.

200.description: JWT token and user info returned.

400.description: Invalid or expired OTP, or email not found.

post.summary: Verify an OTP and sign in as an Admin.
post.description: Returns a JWT token scoped to the Admin role on success.

200.description: JWT token and user info returned.

400.description: Invalid or expired OTP, or email not found.

post.summary: Verify an OTP and sign in as a Doctor.
post.description: Returns a JWT token scoped to the Doctor role on success.

200.description: JWT token and user info returned.

400.description: Invalid or expired OTP, or email not found.

post.summary: Create a new blog post. (Admin only)

get.summary: List all blog posts, newest first.
Retrieve a single blog post by ID.

404.description: No blog post with the given ID.

patch.summary: Partially update a blog post (only supplied fields are changed). (Admin only)

404.description: No blog post with the given ID.

delete.summary: Delete a blog post by ID. (Admin only)

404.description: No blog post with the given ID.

post.summary: Initiate a doctor-appointment booking and create a Razorpay payment link.
post.description:
**Flow:**
1. Validates the doctor exists and is active.
2. Parses the time slot string (format: `HH:mm-HH:mm`, e.g. `09:00-09:30`).
3. Creates a pending `BookingSession` with a JSON snapshot of the booking data.
4. Calls the Razorpay API to generate a payment link for the consultation fee.
5. Returns all booking details plus the Razorpay `paymentLinkUrl`.
            
The actual `Booking` record is only created after Razorpay fires the
`payment_link.paid` webhook to `POST /checkout/razorpay/webhook`.

200.description: Booking session created; returns booking details and Razorpay payment URL.

400.description: Invalid time slot format, or customer profile not found.

404.description: Doctor not found or inactive.

get.summary: List the authenticated customer's bookings, newest appointment first.

200.description: Paginated list of the customer's bookings.

404.description: Customer profile not found.

get.summary: List the authenticated doctor's bookings, newest appointment first.

200.description: Paginated list of the doctor's bookings.

404.description: Doctor profile not found.

post.summary: Add a product to the cart (or increase its quantity if already present).

200.description: Updated cart with all items and recalculated total.

404.description: Product not found.

post.summary: Remove a product from the cart (or decrease its quantity).
post.description: If `quantity` is omitted or equals/exceeds the current quantity the item is removed entirely.

404.description: Cart or product not found.

get.summary: Retrieve the current user's cart with all items and the recalculated total.

parameters.name: couponName
parameters.description: Optional coupon code to preview the discounted total (coupon is NOT applied or recorded).

200.description: Cart with items and total price. When a valid coupon is supplied, includes a `couponPreview` object with the discount breakdown.

404.description: No active cart for this user.

delete.summary: Delete the current user's entire cart and all its items.

404.description: No active cart for this user.

post.summary: Create a new doctor account and profile. (Admin only)
post.description: Creates a User with role Doctor and a linked DoctorProfile in a single call.

200.description: Doctor created; returns the profile DTO.

409.description: A user with this email already exists.

get.summary: List all doctor profiles. (Admin only)

200.description: Paginated list of all profiles, newest first.

patch.summary: Partially update a doctor profile. (Admin only)

404.description: No doctor profile with the given ID.

409.description: Another user already uses the supplied email.

delete.description: The underlying user is demoted to Customer role to preserve booking history.

404.description: No doctor profile with the given ID.

get.summary: Retrieve a single doctor profile by ID. (Admin only)

404.description: No doctor profile with the given ID.

get.summary: List all active doctors (summary view for customers). No authentication required.

200.description: Paginated, alphabetically ordered list of active doctors with consultation fee.

get.summary: Get a doctor's full profile with per-weekday available 30-minute slots. No authentication required.
get.description:
Available slots are computed by subtracting the doctor's unavailability blocks from the full 24-hour day,
then splitting each resulting window into 30-minute intervals (e.g. `09:00–09:30`, `09:30–10:00`).

200.description: Doctor detail with weekly availability slots.

404.description: No active doctor with the given ID.

post.summary: Add an unavailability block for the authenticated doctor's own schedule.
post.description: startTime and endTime must be in `HH:mm` format. endTime must be after startTime.

400.description: Invalid time format or end time not after start time.

404.description: No doctor profile linked to the authenticated user.

get.summary: List all unavailability blocks for the authenticated doctor.

200.description: Paginated unavailability blocks ordered by weekday and start time.

404.description: No doctor profile linked to the authenticated user.

post.summary: Add an unavailability block for any doctor by profile ID. (Admin only)
post.description: startTime and endTime must be in `HH:mm` format. endTime must be after startTime.

404.description: No doctor profile with the given ID.

get.summary: List all unavailability blocks for a specific doctor by profile ID. (Admin only)

200.description: Paginated unavailability blocks ordered by weekday and start time.

get.summary: Retrieve a single unavailability block by ID. Accessible by the owning doctor or an Admin.

403.description: Block does not belong to the authenticated doctor.

404.description: No block with the given ID.

patch.summary: Partially update an unavailability block. Accessible by the owning doctor or an Admin.

403.description: Block does not belong to the authenticated doctor.

404.description: No block with the given ID.

delete.summary: Delete an unavailability block. Accessible by the owning doctor or an Admin.

403.description: Block does not belong to the authenticated doctor.

404.description: No block with the given ID.

404.description: Customer profile not found.

post.summary: Initiate checkout for the authenticated customer's cart and generate a Razorpay payment link.
post.description:
**Flow:**
1. Resolves the cart and optionally validates/applies a coupon.
2. Creates a `CheckoutSession` with a snapshot of the cart items.
3. Calls the Razorpay API and returns the payment link URL.
            
Orders are only created after Razorpay fires the `payment_link.paid` webhook.

200.description: Checkout initiated; returns cart summary and Razorpay payment URL.

400.description: Cart is empty, coupon is invalid, or customer profile missing.

post.summary: Razorpay webhook endpoint — confirms payment for product orders and doctor bookings.
post.description:
Razorpay calls this URL after a payment link is paid. The signature in the
`X-Razorpay-Signature` header is verified with HMAC-SHA256 before any action is taken.
            
- For **product** payments: creates Order records and clears the cart.
- For **booking** payments: creates the Booking record linked to customer and doctor.
            
Configure this URL in the Razorpay dashboard under **Webhooks**.

200.description: Webhook processed (always returns 200 to Razorpay, even for no-ops).

400.description: Missing or invalid signature, or malformed payload.

get.summary: Get the authenticated user's profile, including their Customer or Doctor sub-profile.
get.description: Pass the JWT in the `Authorization: Bearer <token>` header.

200.description: Returns user info and role-specific profile data.

post.summary: Complete the profile of the currently logged-in user.
post.description:
Sets the user's name and phone number and marks the account as no longer new.
Should be called once after the first login.

200.description: Profile updated; returns the full user object.

get.summary: List all skincare product entries.

Bearer.description: Enter your JWT token (without the 'Bearer ' prefix).
